description: This file contains a set of functions implementing a skill scoring engine for role and proficiency assessment, including classification, validation, and compatibility scoring.

methods.name: classifySkillProficiency
methods.description: Classifies user skills into mastery, growth, and other categories based on proficiency thresholds.

methods.name: validateThreeTwoBalance
methods.description: Validates if user skills meet the 3 mastery + 2 growth balance against role requirements.

methods.name: buildThreeTwoReport
methods.description: Builds a report object indicating validation status and selected skills for role fit.

methods.name: scoreRoleCompatibility
methods.description: Calculates a compatibility score based on user skills and role required skills.
